prompt: An ultra-minimal flat vector brand symbol on a pure solid WHITE background, centered with generous margin. ONE clean geometric capital letter 'A' in solid San Marino blue (#4D6E9E), with a small '+' (plus) forming the crossbar of the A. Single flat color, NO gradient, NO DNA, NO hexagon, NO outline noise. Bold, simple, instantly recognizable silhouette that still reads clearly when shrunk to a tiny favicon. Modern medical-biotech monogram. NO text, NO wordmark, no letters other than the single A.

A minimal app-icon style brand mark on a pure solid WHITE background, centered. A solid rounded-square tile in San Marino blue (#4D6E9E) with a clean WHITE knockout capital 'A' and a small white '+' to its upper right inside the tile. Flat, single color, no gradient, no DNA, no clutter. Bold and instantly recognizable at any size like a phone app icon. NO extra text, NO wordmark.

A minimal abstract monoline brand symbol on a pure solid WHITE background, centered. Two clean even-weight strokes in San Marino blue (#4D6E9E) forming an upward peak that reads as a capital 'A' / arrow suggesting elevation and longevity, with a small '+' integrated at the apex. Single flat color, geometric, generous negative space, no DNA, no hexagon, no gradient. Simple iconic mark that works at tiny sizes. NO text, NO wordmark.

A minimal flat brand emblem on a pure solid WHITE background, centered. A solid San Marino blue (#4D6E9E) CIRCLE with a clean capital 'A' formed in white negative space cut out of the circle, and a small '+' notch. Single flat color knockout, no gradient, no DNA, no clutter. Bold, balanced, instantly recognizable like a coin or app icon. NO text, NO wordmark.

A minimal geometric brand monogram on a pure solid WHITE background, centered. A bold stencil-style capital 'A' in San Marino blue (#4D6E9E) where the apex of the A is replaced by a clean '+' (plus) point. Single flat color, sharp clean geometry, lots of negative space, no DNA, no hexagon, no gradient. Confident simple mark that stays legible when very small. NO text, NO wordmark, only the single A form.

A minimal two-tone brand symbol on a pure solid WHITE background, centered. A clean geometric capital 'A' split into two flat tones — left half San Marino blue (#4D6E9E), right half near-black navy — with a small navy '+' sitting at the top-right shoulder of the A. Flat, no gradient, no DNA, no hexagon, no clutter. Crisp, modern, instantly recognizable at small sizes. NO text, NO wordmark.
